helper_booking_submit_success: Booking request submitted! You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
helper_booking_submit_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
helper_booking_network_error: Network error. Please check your connection.
helper_rating_desc_satisfactory: Item is functioning as intended; no concerns observed.
helper_rating_desc_monitor: Item is functional but shows wear; recommend periodic re-inspection.
helper_rating_desc_defect: Item is broken, deteriorated, or unsafe; recommend repair or replacement.
helper_rating_desc_defective: Item is not functioning as intended; repair or replacement is recommended.
helper_rating_desc_not_inspected: Item could not be inspected (inaccessible, unsafe, or excluded).
helper_rating_desc_not_present: Item is not present at this property.
helper_rating_desc_inspected: Item was inspected and meets the Standards of Practice.
helper_rating_desc_functional: Item visually inspected and observed to be in serviceable, functional condition.
helper_rating_desc_hazardous: Item presents an immediate safety hazard and should be addressed without delay.
helper_pdf_rate_limit: The PDF service is busy right now. Please wait for the countdown, then try again.
helper_pdf_network: Couldn't reach the PDF service. Please wait, then try again.
helper_caloauth_interaction_required: Google sign-in needs another step. Please try connecting again.
helper_caloauth_login_required: Google sign-in session expired. Please try connecting again.
helper_caloauth_consent_required: Google needs permission confirmation. Please try connecting again.
helper_caloauth_session_expired: The connection session expired. Please try again.
helper_caloauth_not_configured: Google Calendar is not configured for this workspace. Contact your administrator.
helper_caloauth_no_refresh_token: Google did not grant ongoing access. Try connecting again and approve all permissions.
helper_caloauth_exchange_failed: Could not complete Google Calendar authorization. Please try again.
helper_caloauth_generic: Could not connect Google Calendar. Please try again.
helper_pdf_busy_hint: Generating your PDF — this can take up to a minute.
